name: Kajipeet
short_description: Kajipeet is a local multiplayer game for 2 to 4 players. In this game you will have to try on the role of a marshmallow/bober/stick samurai and show your friends who is the main marshmallow here. Katanas, maps, bonuses and a lot of fun!
detailed_description:
Kajipeet is a local multiplayer game for 2 to 4 players. In this game you will have to try on the role of a marshmallow/bober/stick samurai and show your friends who is the main marshmallow here. Katanas, maps, bonuses and a lot of fun!

Gameplay

Choose the number of players from 2 to 4 and enjoy battles with your friends. The maps will change after each victory of one of the players, the winner is the one who scored 8 points earlier than the rest, by destroying his opponents. Various improvements can appear on the map, such as additional attacks and the ability to influence what is happening on the map, for example, the "Royal Battle" bonus creates a field behind which the player will lose health, and over time, be pulled to the center.

Content

In the game:

  • a lot upgrade

  • a lot level

  • a lot music

  • Easter Egg

  • Interesting mechanic

supported_languages: English, French, German, Polish, Russian, Turkish
